title: Indonesian Language
description: Practice basic Indonesian phrases and conversation.

front.description: How do you get to school?

back.description: My school is located in Donvale

front.description: How many people are in your family?

back.value: Ada lima orang dalam keluarga saya,
back.description: There are five people in my family

back.value: Saya tinggal Bersama, ibu, bapak, “2” adik, “female,male”
back.description: I live with, mother, father, “2” younger siblings, “female,male”

front.value: Siapa nama ibu dan bapak Anda?
front.description: What is the names of your mother and father?

back.value: Nama ibu saya ... dan nama bapak ...
back.description: My mothers name is ... and my fathers name is ...

front.description: What are the names of your siblings

back.value: Adik perempuan saya ... Adik laki-laki saya ...
back.description: My younger female siblings name is ... My younger male siblings name is ...

front.description: How old is your younger sibling(s)

back.value: Adik laki-laki saya berumur Sembilan tahun. Adik perempuan saya berumur dua belas tahun
back.description: My younger male sibling is nine years old. My younger female sibling is twelve years old.

front.value: Anda pergi ke mana pada hari Sabtu dan hari Minggu?
front.description: You go where on Saturday and Sunday?

back.value: Saya belajar bahasa Inggris. Saya suka behasa Inggris
back.description: I study english, i like english

front.description: Are there any pets at home?
